arts.ttl: Bruno Guimaraes: Newcastle star 'not interested' in Man City transfer due to 'two factors'
arts.sum: Manchester City reportedly suffer a transfer blow in their pursuit of Newcastle United and Brazil midfielder Bruno Guimaraes.

arts.ttl: Team News: Everton vs. Newcastle United injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Everton and Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: Jose Mourinho to Everton: Ex-Chelsea boss 'a strong option' to replace Sean Dyche
arts.sum: Fenerbahce boss Jose Mourinho emerges as 'a strong option' to replace Sean Dyche as Everton manager, according to a report.

arts.ttl: FIFA's new transfer rules will 'change football landscape' for Newcastle after unprecedented decision
arts.sum: According to the court's judgement, FIFA's refusal to issue an International Transfer Certificate for Diarra's move to Charleroi shows its rules "impede the free movement of professional footballers wishing to develop their activity by going to work for a new club". Diarra pursued legal action, arguing that his freedom of movement was affected, with the French international taking a year-long break from football after Charleroi withdrew from a deal, reports the Mirror .

arts.ttl: Newcastle United to make 'emotional' Everton selection as popular star left with 'work to do'
arts.sum: "Time will tell and his performances will dictate that," Howe said of Osula's Premier League readiness this week. "There was some really bright flashes from him, but like any young player, he knows he has areas of his game to work on.

arts.ttl: Triple boost and one blow: Eddie Howe issues Newcastle injury update for Everton clash
arts.sum: Eddie Howe provides a fresh injury update on five Newcastle United players, including Alexander Isak and Fabian Schar, ahead of Saturday's Premier League trip to Everton.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United stadium decision 'won't please everybody' as 'hate' admission made
arts.sum: Eddie Howe would 'hate' to see Newcastle United leave St James' Park - but the club's hierarchy have a huge decision to make that 'won't please everybody'. "It's a massive decision because it will affect the next however many years at the football club," Howe said.

arts.ttl: Everton boss admits 'big blow' as injury crisis worsens
arts.sum: Everton have suffered two ACL injuries in the space of two games after having endured an injury-hit 2023/24 season

arts.ttl: Howe set for Premier League first this season - Newcastle United predicted starting XI at Everton - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: After making a raft of changes in midweek, Eddie Howe could do something he hasn't done so far this season and pick the same Newcastle United starting XI for consecutive Premier League games for this weekend's match against Everton. Alexander Isak is ruled out, although he and Callum Wilson should be back for the game with Brighton after the international break, while several rested players are likely to return after sitting out the midweek Carabao Cup win over AFC Wimbledon, including Sandro Tonali.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe makes 'emotional' Anthony Gordon Newcastle admission before Everton return
arts.sum: Eddie Howe has backed the 23-year-old to fight through his emotions as he returns to his boyhood club once again
